mapper.select: SELECT role_name AS name, COUNT(*) AS value FROM (SELECT CASE role_type WHEN 'admin' THEN '管理员' WHEN 'teacher' THEN '教师' END AS role_name FROM edu_user WHERE 1=1 AND status = #{status}) t GROUP BY role_name

SELECT difficulty_name AS name, COUNT(*) AS value FROM (SELECT CASE difficulty_level WHEN 1 THEN '基础' WHEN 2 THEN '中级' WHEN 3 THEN '高级' END AS difficulty_name FROM edu_course WHERE 1=1 AND create_time >= #{startTime} AND create_time <= #{endTime} AND audit_status = #{auditStatus}) t GROUP BY difficulty_name

SELECT type_name AS name, COUNT(*) AS value FROM (SELECT CASE question_type WHEN 1 THEN '单选题' WHEN 2 THEN '多选题' WHEN 3 THEN '判断题' WHEN 4 THEN '填空题' WHEN 5 THEN '主观题' END AS type_name FROM edu_question_bank WHERE 1=1 AND difficulty_level = #{difficultyLevel} AND status = #{status}) t GROUP BY type_name

SELECT status_name AS name, COUNT(*) AS value FROM (SELECT CASE submit_status WHEN 0 THEN '未提交' WHEN 1 THEN '已提交' END AS status_name FROM edu_student_exam_record WHERE 1=1 AND start_time >= #{startTime} AND start_time <= #{endTime}) t GROUP BY status_name

SELECT difficulty_name AS name, AVG(total_score) AS value FROM (SELECT ep.difficulty_level, CASE ep.difficulty_level WHEN 1 THEN '简单' WHEN 2 THEN '中等' WHEN 3 THEN '困难' END AS difficulty_name, er.total_score FROM edu_student_exam_record er LEFT JOIN edu_chapter_exam_paper ep ON er.paper_id = ep.id WHERE er.submit_status = 1 AND er.submit_time >= #{startTime} AND er.submit_time <= #{endTime}) t GROUP BY difficulty_name, difficulty_level ORDER BY difficulty_level

SELECT type_name AS name, COUNT(*) AS value FROM (SELECT CASE content_type WHEN 1 THEN '学习视频' WHEN 2 THEN '学习文档' END AS type_name FROM edu_chapter_content WHERE 1=1 AND chapter_id IN (SELECT id FROM edu_course_chapter WHERE course_id = #{courseId})) t GROUP BY type_name

SELECT difficulty_name AS name, COUNT(*) AS value FROM ( SELECT CASE difficulty_level WHEN 1 THEN '简单' WHEN 2 THEN '中等' WHEN 3 THEN '困难' END AS difficulty_name FROM edu_chapter_exam_paper WHERE 1=1 ) t GROUP BY difficulty_name ORDER BY FIELD(t.difficulty_name, '简单', '中等', '困难')
